segments.text: You're our new protocol engineering supervisor
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: for the electrical design of our mammalian genetics research team, PES.
segments.speaker: S22

segments.text: I don't know the first thing about being a...
segments.speaker: S23

segments.text: What is it I'm supposed to be?
segments.speaker: S23

segments.text: I'll find my own way out. I'm leaving now.
segments.speaker: S23

segments.text: Just curious, did I get paid for today?
